title: The Cat Dimension
description: A mod adding tons of cat related stuff including a new dimension, structures, blocks and more (will update eventually)
body:
![The Cat Dimension Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/W5ZLYklo/images/c2b29e76a955e961f5138dc42d79415f61b74392.png)
**WARNING - THIS MOD IS IN EARLY ACCESS SO THERE MAY BE BUGS,**


A Minecraft Mod full of tons of New Cat Stuff including a New Dimension, Structures, Blocks and more.


To start your adventure explore a Castle hidden in the overworld (Plains) and light up the portal. 
Have fun.
 
## Structures
This Mod contains 2 new structures some in the Overworld and some in The Cat Dimension:
- TheCatKing's Castle is a well a castle that leads you to The Cat Dimension - Found in Plains Overworld and Everywhere in The Cat Dimension.
- The Cat Tree is a climbable structure with 2 unique variations with your goal being to get to the top - Found Everywhere in The Cat Dimension.
 
![The New Structures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/W5ZLYklo/images/d4eeeb42ea3bf988de3d5a604d36286154af7625.jpeg)

## The Cat Staff
The Cat Staff
The Cat Staff is a Item found in TheCatKing's Castle and is used to light the Portal for The Cat Dimension and is planned to be able to be upgraded in V.1.0.
 
![Cat Staff in Chest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/W5ZLYklo/images/6adb7fc6c7d08c5cb1c38dfebdb2489451a9236d.png)
 
## New Amour
There is 2 new pieces of amour being the Crown and the Robe.
- The Crown is found split into 3 pieces scattered across TheCatKing's Castle and is worn like a helmet.
- The Robe is found in TheCatKing's Castle and is worn like a chestplate, it also gives you slow falling.

 ![The New Armour](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/W5ZLYklo/images/7ebc9a29ce0f365cd25fab16c72ccbc4ce8b0231.png)
 
## New blocks
There is 3 new blocks including Catstone as well as the Mew.
- Catstone comes in 2 forms - Catstone and Catslate - these are made using a Stonecutter (Stone Cobbled Deepslate).
- The Mew is a block that when clicked Meows, found in TheCatKing's Castle.

![The New Blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/W5ZLYklo/images/e300acffcb600619aa49e11dfd4edbe067684084.png) 

## Catnip
Catnip is found in The Cat Dimension and when fed to a cat gives them postive effects like Regeneration and Speed for 1 minute. To obtain it put it into a Crafting Table and it becomes 3 Catnip.


Additionally if you craft it into Catnip Cake you can feed the Cake to a Cat 7 times before it disapears.
 
![Catnip](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/W5ZLYklo/images/ef6301bc42179c6b54a37771646ace14c172f978.png)
